name: Asparagus w/ Cashews
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the tough lower stems from the asparagus and discard them.
Cut each stalk diagonally into 3 or 4 pieces.
2. Heat the olive oil and sesame oil together in a wok over high heat.
3. Add the ginger and stir-fry for one minute until fragrant.
4. Add the asparagus to the wok and stir-fry until it is tender but still crisp,
about 4 to 5 minutes.
5. Stir in the cashews and soy sauce. Serve immediately.
